name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states, States

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
Forks == forks \in [0 .. N-1 -> 0 .. N-1]
States == states \in [0 .. N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ Forks
        /\ States = [i \in 0 .. N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
        \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"

(* Invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ Forks
          /\ States

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N])]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = TRUE
          /\ num[i] > 0
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                j # i
                /\ flag[j] = FALSE
                \/ (num[j] = 0)
                \/ (num[j] > num[i])
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (RandomInt(-Epsilon, Epsilon))]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (Sum([j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j]]) \div N)]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (RandomInt(-Epsilon, Epsilon))]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : -Epsilon <= offsets[i] <= Epsilon

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, topics, messages, subscriptions, brokerState

CONSTANTS Subscribers, Topics, Messages, Subscriptions, BrokerState

Init == /\ subscribers \in SUBSET 1..10
        /\ topics \in SUBSET 1..5
        /\ messages \in SUBSET 1..20
        /\ subscriptions \in SUBSET 1..30
        /\ brokerState \in 1..5

Next == /\ subscribers' \in SUBSET 1..10
        /\ topics' \in SUBSET 1..5
        /\ messages' \in SUBSET 1..20
        /\ subscriptions' \in SUBSET 1..30
        /\ brokerState' \in 1..5

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, topics, messages, subscriptions, brokerState>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants = 1
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = 0
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants = 0
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = 1
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

(* --algorithm GCounter
  }
  action increment(n \in Node) {

  }
  action merge(n \in Node) {

  }
end
*)

(* --type invariants
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --specification
Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ \E n \in Node : /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
*)
